name: Kaito Arashi
bio: Believer in limitless possibilities, always seeking new horizons to conquer.

name: Akira Shinsui
bio: Proponent of stability and structure, convinced that order is the foundation for progress.

name: Lila Katsuragi
bio: Champion of innovation and imagination, believing that creativity is the spark for human advancement.

name: Kaito Arashi
bio: Believes that the will of humanity can shape the world's destiny. Advocates for bold innovation and unyielding perseverance.
speech_style: Passionate and assertive, often using metaphors to drive home a point
